extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS Michael attacked final 400m to pass JORGENSEN on Puy de Dôme; POGAČAR took 8 seconds from VINGEGAARD on final slopes.
tactical_patterns: JORGENSEN solo at 50km created 25-30 second gap but cracked final 400m on 14% gradient finishing slopes.
MOHORIČ bridged alone from chase group but was passed by WOODS's late acceleration showing explosive power beats diesel climbing.
POGAČAR attacked repeatedly final 300m on 14% slopes, taking 8 seconds from VINGEGAARD who couldn't respond to surges.

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: explosive final 400m attack on 14% gradient after 170km suggests superior short-effort climbing at extreme gradients
rider_signals.JORGENSEN Matteo: negative: 25-30 second solo advantage disappeared final 400m revealing inability to maintain power on steepest finishing slopes
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: repeated accelerations final 300m at 14% gradient took 8 seconds showing recovering form after early deficit
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: couldn't respond to POGAČAR's surges on 14% finale suggesting weakness at extreme gradients under fatigue
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: negative: distanced before final climb begins, concerning signal for defending podium on steep mountain finishes
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: positive: stayed with POGAČAR/VINGEGAARD group again, consistently performing above pre-race expectations
rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: negative: refused to work for MOSCON in chase behind breakaway showing internal team friction or conflicting objectives
